Tests the `toString` method of a `Number` object with `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY`.

# Purpose
This code is a single assertion test that checks the behavior of the `toString` method on a `Number` object initialized with `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY`. It verifies that calling `toString` with an `undefined` argument correctly returns the string "-Infinity". This test ensures that the `toString` method behaves as expected when handling negative infinity values in JavaScript. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on the correct string representation of negative infinity.
